assessment_objectives.objective: the configuration change control element of which the cybersecurity / data privacy representatives are to be members is defined.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: Configuration Control Board (CCB) or similar function

assessment_objectives.objective: security representatives required to be members of the change control element are defined.
privacy representatives required to be members of the change control element are defined.
organization-defined security representatives are required to be members of the organization-defined configuration change control element.
organization-defined privacy representatives are required to be members of the organization-defined configuration change control element.
